Interface IRasterColormap4

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a raster colormap.

[Guid("706F687A-AE96-416F-AEEB-BD234BBB7DC9")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRasterColormap4 : IRasterColormap3, IRasterColormap2, IRasterColormap
